description_long: This is a large, two-story wooden cabin with a dark, hipped roof and prominent overhangs. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden logs, giving it a rustic yet substantial appearance. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically arranged on each visible side, framed in dark wood. The front features a covered porch area and a garage, while the rear and side elevations show additional porches and balconies. The roof includes dormer elements and two chimneys, adding architectural interest and functionality. The cabin sits on a stone or concrete foundation, suggesting durability and stability.
description: A spacious, two-story wooden cabin with a dark hipped roof, multiple windows, and covered porches, built in a rustic log style.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, a covered porch, and a garage, with large windows and a prominent roof overhang.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights a wide roof with a central dormer, a rear porch, and fewer windows, emphasizing the cabin's breadth.
description_view_2: The left side view displays a side porch, several windows, and the depth of the roof overhangs.
description_view_3: The back view reveals symmetrical window placement, a small balcony or porch, and the rear roofline with a chimney.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with wide overhangs, dormer, and two chimneys, constructed from dark roofing material
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows symmetrically distributed on all visible sides, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced evenly; windows are medium to large in size and framed in dark wood
attribute_door_placement: One main entrance door on the front facade beneath the porch, a garage door adjacent to the main entrance, and a possible side or rear door visible on the left and back sides near the porches
